parameters.subject: ={{ $json.type === 'rfp' ? 'Request for Proposal' : 'Request for Quotation' }} — PR {{ $json.pr_id }}
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $json.supplier_contact_name }},

We would like to invite {{ $json.supplier_name }} to submit a {{ $json.type === 'rfp' ? 'proposal' : 'quotation' }} for the following requirement.

{{ $json.type === 'rfp' ? $json.rfp_document : $json.rfq_document }}

Submission Deadline: {{ $json.deadline }}

Please submit your {{ $json.type === 'rfp' ? 'proposal' : 'quotation' }} by replying to this email or uploading your response at the link below:

Submit Response

Should you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Procurement Team

parameters.subject: REMINDER: {{ $json.type === 'rfp' ? 'RFP' : 'RFQ' }} Response Overdue — PR {{ $json.pr_id }}
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $json.supplier_contact_name }},

This is a reminder that your {{ $json.type === 'rfp' ? 'proposal' : 'quotation' }} for PR {{ $json.pr_id }} was due on {{ $json.deadline }} and is now {{ $json.days_overdue }} day(s) overdue.

Please submit your response as soon as possible or contact us if you need an extension.

Best regards,
Procurement Team

meta.description: Receives the CM-approved supplier shortlist and RFQ/RFP document from LangGraph, splits into individual items, sends a personalised SMTP email to each supplier, logs outreach, and notifies LangGraph when done. A separate scheduled branch sends overdue reminders daily at 09:00 on business days.
